themes.title: Accessibility Enhancements
themes.description: Improvements to ensure the platform is accessible to all users.

themes.title: User Feedback and Testing
themes.description: Collecting user feedback and conducting tests to improve accessibility features.

milestones.name: MVP Accessibility Features
milestones.description: Implement critical accessibility features for screen readers and video content.
milestones.success_criteria: 100% of critical accessibility features implemented and tested.

milestones.name: V1 Accessibility Improvements
milestones.description: Enhance accessibility with additional features and compliance metrics.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve compliance with accessibility standards and user satisfaction.

milestones.name: V2 User Feedback and Testing
milestones.description: Collect user feedback and conduct A/B testing for accessibility features.
milestones.success_criteria: Gather actionable user feedback and improve features based on testing results.

sequencing.reason: V1 enhancements depend on the successful implementation of MVP features.
V2 features rely on the improvements and metrics established in V1.

mvp.goal: Implement essential accessibility features to meet critical user needs.

v1.goal: Enhance accessibility features and ensure compliance with standards.

v2.goal: Collect user feedback and optimize accessibility features through testing.
